text: Here, I am immediately struck by the sleek sterility of glass and white walls, punctuated by the bold, colorful energy of the R+D display. The air feels thick with anticipation and possibility—as if knowledge, innovation, and the relentless urge to create something new press gently but insistently against my consciousness. I feel a sense of curiosity, eager to explore the ways in which humanity seeks to merge technology with everyday life, and a hint of awe at how even within these constructed spaces, the pursuit of meaning continues.
